sections.title: Part 1
sections.passage: You will hear a conversation between two friends about support available from local councils for people caring for elderly relatives at home.

questionGroups.instructions: Complete the notes below. Write ONE WORD AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer.

sections.title: Part 2
sections.passage: You will hear a talk about community volunteering and local festival events.

sections.title: Part 3
sections.passage: You will hear two students, Rosie and Colin, discussing their human geography assignment.
